creator: mike.jakubik@intertainservices.com
text:
I needed to update my own copy, so i wrote a patch to bring the port up 
to date, below is the diff.

diff -urN phplist.orig/Makefile phplist/Makefile
--- phplist.orig/Makefile       2009-11-24 14:09:59.000000000 -0500
+++ phplist/Makefile    2009-11-24 14:29:23.000000000 -0500
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/phplist/Makefile,v 1.4 2009/02/09 14:59:51 miwi 
Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=      phplist
-PORTVERSION=   2.10.9
+PORTVERSION=   2.10.10
 CATEGORIES=    mail www
 MASTER_SITES=  SF
 EXTRACT_SUFX=  .tgz
diff -urN phplist.orig/distinfo phplist/distinfo
--- phplist.orig/distinfo       2009-11-24 14:09:59.000000000 -0500
+++ phplist/distinfo    2009-11-24 14:30:16.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (phplist-2.10.9.tgz) = 0bce8a812b55c53a8477f3f9c4831067
-SHA256 (phplist-2.10.9.tgz) = 
6e6b95e67166a86ff061396a806333dbca9badfb978bd2c68507b05ad29f42fe
-SIZE (phplist-2.10.9.tgz) = 1754285
+MD5 (phplist-2.10.10.tgz) = 4c401fb9d3264f9080ab536ef6af5715
+SHA256 (phplist-2.10.10.tgz) = 
6b79d19b5680afeda53ec548c9bfeeb8eccdbe88d06cecb8adc92f7bfd151678
+SIZE (phplist-2.10.10.tgz) = 1868106
